## Added
- **Void basic materials** (opt-in): when enabled, common blocks (stone, dirt, grass, cobblestone, deepslate, gravel, sand…) broken by vein-mining are deleted instead of dropped, so your inventory keeps only the loot you care about. The list is hand-editable in `config/veinminerplusplus/void-blocks.txt`, and a new **Open config folder** button opens straight to it. Voided blocks still cost durability, and the block you break yourself is voided too.

## Changed
- Config now lives in a `config/veinminerplusplus/` subfolder (`config.json` plus the hand-edited `void-blocks.txt`). Files from older versions are moved there automatically on first launch.
- Lowered the default durability cost to **40%** of vanilla (was 65%). Existing configs keep their value.

## Fixed
- Durability cost is now accumulated fractionally across a vein, so the percentage is exact even below 100% — previously a sub-1 per-block cost rounded to 0 or a full point each block, making the slider effectively all-or-nothing for normal blocks.
